content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 16, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on Jun 16, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, hardening agent provisioning, and improving the developer experience. Key achievements include resolving critical 503 errors for new users, implementing dynamic view routing, and finalizing the agent-provisioning fix chain to ensure reliable deployment across Web2 and Web3 environments.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure & Agent Provisioning
- **Provisioning Hardening:** Implemented robust fixes for agent provisioning, including routing agents over the tailnet using container ports rather than host ports ([#8441](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8441)) and ensuring Headscale node lookups use `TS_HOSTNAME` ([#8435](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8435)).
- **Service Reliability:** Resolved the "new-user 503" error by routing default `gpt-oss-120b` requests directly to Cerebras ([#8450](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8450), [#8458](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8458)).
- **Operational Automation:** Added automated Docker-node onboarding and improved provisioning-worker health checks to prevent liveness heartbeat starvation ([#8455](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8455), [#8456](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8456)).

### Agent Framework & Plugin Ecosystem
- **Dynamic View Routing:** Introduced agent-driven view interaction, allowing agents to programmatically open, close, and tile plugin views ([#8445](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8445), [#8446](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8446)).
- **SQL & Data Sync:** Integrated Electric Cloud sync for bidirectional data synchronization in `plugin-sql` ([#8336](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8336)).
- **Registry Updates:** Registered `elizaos-plugin-reddit-search` and `@thecolony/elizaos-plugin` as third-party plugins ([#8347](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8347), [#8381](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8381)).

### Core & Orchestration Improvements
- **Orchestration:** Added progress mode for sub-agent acknowledgments and improved deduplication for spawn acks ([#8416](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8416)).
- **Memory & Performance:** Bound advanced-memory rolling-summary prompts and relationship provider output to prevent planner prompt bloat ([#8290](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8290), [#8415](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8415)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- [#8461](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8461): Fixes BitRouter Cerebras provider protocol declaration.
- [#8457](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8457): Rebuilds first-run onboarding as a 3-way runtime chooser.
- [#8454](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8454): Aligns BitRouter infrastructure contract.
- [#8451](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8451): Adds Headscale control-plane ARM workflow.

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Runtime & Federation
- [#8345](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8345): Closed following the successful launch of Runtime Open Federation, enabling permissionless task participation for Eliza agents.

### Release Pipeline
- [#8428](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8428): Resolved the npm publish failure caused by OIDC trusted-publishing conflicts by reverting to `NPM_TOKEN` authentication ([#8438](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8438)).

## NEW ISSUES
*No new issues were reported today.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES

### Android Build & Mobile Pipeline ([#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387))
- **Status:** Resolved.
- **Discussion:** The team confirmed that clean-tree builds now correctly ship web-less APKs with all necessary assets. The fix involved unifying the Capacitor sync and Gradle build trees. On-device verification on Solana Seeker hardware confirmed that plugins register correctly and the app boots to the onboarding flow. Remaining minor items regarding shared-runtime bridge URLs are being tracked separately.

### Cloud 10-User Launch Tracker ([#8434](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8434))
- **Status:** In Progress / Verified.
- **Discussion:** The core launch experience is verified live on production. The team successfully resolved the new-user 503 errors and confirmed that shared-runtime agents provision correctly. Current efforts are focused on finalizing the dedicated-tier isolation using Headscale on the production control plane and completing the final apps cutover.
